docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP. MOTION ON ORDER TO DEPOSIT SURPLUS FUNDS IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501, THE HOUSING COURT, TO BE HEARD ON MARCH 11, 2013. PLAINTIFFS MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 501, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 11, 2013 AT 4:00 PM PER LOCAL RULE 2. NOTICE OF CONTINUED MOTION ON ORDER TO DEPOSIT SURPLUS FUNDS FILED BY PETITIONER QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Claim Of Surplus Proceeds Of Trustee'S Sale
Off Calendar Sep-15-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: CLAIMANTs HERMAN LEE and KATHERINE YUN's Motion For Claim Of Surplus Proceeds Of Trustee's Sale is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Moving party prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Ntc Of Mtn On (Proposed) Order To Deposit Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Feb-07-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Seth Harris, Esq. of McCarthy & Holthus, LLP, (619-955-1529), for Petitioner and moving party, Quality Loan Service Corp.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP.' Motion On Order To Deposit Surplus Funds is GRANTED. Moving party shall deposit the surplus funds with the Court forthwith. Moving party shall be discharged from its obligation upon depositing the funds. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Ntc Of Mtn On Order To Deposit Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Mar-11-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP.'s Motion On Order To Deposit Surplus Funds is Off Calendar. Moving party failed to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and order of 2/11/2013. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk L. Fong, not reported. (D501)

Ntc Of Mtn On Order To Deposit Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Feb-11-2013 Continued To Mar-11-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP. motion On Order To Deposit Surplus Funds is Transferred to Department 501, the Housing Court, to be heard on March 11, 2013. Plaintiffs must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 501, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 11, 2013 at 4:00 pm per Local Rule 2. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
